わぁ、司令官！ 見てください、このお花！<br>これ、『ガーディアンブルーム』っ: Wow, Commander! Look at this flower! It's called a 'guardian bloom'!
ペルディオンにしか咲かないはずなのに……。<br>まさか、前線基地でお会いできる:
It should only bloom in Perdion... but I never expected to find it at
the Frontline Base!
まるで騎士の盾みたいな形の花びらが特徴の可愛いお花なんです。<br>花言葉は『揺:
It's a cute flower with petals shaped just like a knight's shield. Its
flower language is 'Unwavering Loyalty'... Don't you think it's cool?
是非、こちらは持ち帰って司令室に飾ってください。<br>ペルディオンでは縁起のい:
Please take this back and display it in the command room. In Perdion,
it's used as a good luck charm.
この花のように、わたしも護衛として、<br>司令官さまをお守りする『盾』になりた:
Like this flower, I too, as your guard, wish to become a 'shield' that
protects you, Commander!
